title: STONEBORN UI - Accessories Compatability
description: Adds a STONEBORN UI-styled interface to the Accessories-mod inventory. Made for Minecraft 1.20.1.
body:
Accessories (+ spell engine support) for STONEBORN UI Overhaul (Minecraft 1.20.1).

It contains only the assets necessary to adapt the Accessories interface. The base STONEBORN UI resource-pack is still required.

** Requirements **
- Minecraft 1.20.1
- STONEBORN UI Overhaul by Sindavar
- Modrinth page: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stoneborn
- Accessories Mod

** Installation **
- First, install Sindavar's STONEBORN UI Overhaul: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stoneborn
- Place this pack above STONEBORN UI in the resource-pack order.

** Credits ** 
- Created by Davobe
- STONEBORN UI Overhaul created by Sindavar

** Permissions / Licensing **
- This pack includes only compatibility assets created by me.
- STONEBORN UI Overhaul remains fully owned by Sindavar.
- Do not redistribute STONEBORN’s base textures or claim them as your own.
- You may share or modify this compatibility pack as long as credit to both creators is preserved and STONEBORN’s original license is respected.
